## Idea

What small E-base behavior should this explore?

## Starting point

- Sample:
- File or module:
- CLI command:

## What would make it fun?

- [ ] Shows E digits or normalization
- [ ] Shows heat or cooling
- [ ] Shows quantization or degradation
- [ ] Improves the Playground view
- [ ] Adds a compiler challenge case

## Done when

```powershell
python -m unittest discover -s tests
python -m epu_cli challenge --json
```
